---
title: "Rāg Iman kalyāṇ"
subtitle: "*śankara śiva pinākī*"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
---

::: {.composer-info}
**Composer:** Budhaprakāś &nbsp;·&nbsp; **Tāl:** Suraphāktāl (Madhyalay)
:::

## Lyrics {.unnumbered}

::: {.lyrics-block}

**Sthāyī**

> śankara śiva pinākī gaṅgādhara<br>vikhadhara vāmadeva īśvara ḍamarū kara

**Antarā**

> bhasma anga śobhita bhujanga bhālacandra<br>śṛngī phukata hai bholā digambara

**Sañcārī**

> tilaka lalāṭa gale ruṇḍhamāla trinayana<br>bara dātā gaurī sanga trisula dharana

**Ābhog**

> paśūpatī viśvanātha mṛtyunjaya<br>japa mahādeva nāma hara hara

:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal" collapse="true"}
## Reading the notation

Suraphāktāl is a 10-beat cycle. In this layout, it is divided into blocks corresponding to **4 + 2 + 4** (vibhāgs marked **X**, **2**, **3**). Each row below shows **one complete cycle**: the ten columns correspond to beats 1–10, with sam **X** at beat 1.

The sargam row gives the notes; the bold text row below it gives the lyrics syllables. A dash **-** indicates a held note or empty beat. Brackets $\lb{\cdot}$ denote meend (glide) or grouped notes; superscripts $\sps{\cdot}$ indicate the starting grace note of a glide; $\tr{X}$ denotes a note in the upper octave (tār saptak); $\mn{X}$ denotes a note in the lower octave (mandra saptak).
:::

## Sthāyī {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .suraphaktal}

| **X** |   |   |   | **2** |   | **3** |   |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| $\lb{\mathrm{PP}}$ | N | D | P | M | G | P | G | - | G |
| **śa** | **-** | **nka** | **ra** | **śi** | **va** | **pi** | **nā** | **-** | **kī** |
| R | $\lb{\mathrm{GR}}$ | G | m | G | R | $\mn{\mathrm{N}}$ | R | S | S |
| **ga** | **-** | **ngā** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **dha** | **ra** |
| $\mn{\mathrm{N}}$ | S | R | G | G | - | R | $\mn{\mathrm{N}}$ | R | S |
| **vi** | **kha** | **dha** | **ra** | **vā** | **-** | **ma** | **de** | **-** | **va** |
| S | $\lb{\mathrm{GR}}$ | G | m | $\lb{\mathrm{GR}}$ | G | $\lb{\mathrm{R}\mn{\mathrm{N}}}$ | R | S | S |
| **ī** | **-** | **śva** | **ra** | **ḍa** | **ma** | **ru** | **-** | **ka** | **ra** |

:::

## Antarā {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .suraphaktal}

| **X** |   |   |   | **2** |   | **3** |   |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| $\lb{\mathrm{PM}}$ | D | P | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{P}}\tr{\mathrm{S}}}$ | - | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | - | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ |
| **bha** | **-** | **sma** | **a** | **-** | **nga** | **śo** | **-** | **bhi** | **ta** |
| $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{S}}\mathrm{N}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{G}}\tr{\mathrm{R}}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{G}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{G}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | N | D |
| **bhu** | **ja** | **-** | **nga** | **bhā** | **-** | **la** | **ca** | **-** | **ndra** |
| $\lb{\mathrm{PM}}$ | D | P | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{P}}\tr{\mathrm{S}}}$ | - | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | - | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ |
| **bha** | **-** | **sma** | **a** | **-** | **ṅga** | **śo** | **-** | **bhi** | **ta** |
| $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{S}}\mathrm{N}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{G}}\tr{\mathrm{R}}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{G}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{G}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | N | D |
| **bhu** | **ja** | **-** | **ṅga** | **bhā** | **-** | **la** | **ca** | **-** | **ndra** |
| D | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | N | D | N | D | P | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{D}}\mathrm{M}}$ | - |
| **śṛ** | **-** | **ngi** | **-** | **phu** | **-** | **ka** | **ta** | **hai** | **-** |
| G | R | G | m | G | R | $\mn{\mathrm{N}}$ | R | S | S |
| **bho** | **-** | **lā** | **-** | **di** | **-** | **ga** | **-** | **mba** | **ra** |

:::

## Sañcārī {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .suraphaktal}

| **X** |   |   |   | **2** |   | **3** |   |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| G | G | P | P | P | M | D | P | P | - |
| **ti** | **la** | **ka** | **la** | **lā** | **-** | **ṭa** | **ga** | **le** | **-** |
| D | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | N | D | N | D | P | D | P | M |
| **ru** | **-** | **ṇdha** | **mā** | **-** | **la** | **tri** | **na** | **ya** | **na** |
| G | R | G | m | G | R | $\mn{\mathrm{N}}$ | R | S | - |
| **ba** | **ra** | **dā** | **-** | **tā** | **-** | **gau** | **-** | **rī** | **-** |
| G | - | P | P | $\lb{\mathrm{PP}}$ | N | D | P | P | M |
| **sa** | **-** | **nga** | **tri** | **su** | **-** | **la** | **dha** | **ra** | **na** |

:::

## Ābhog {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .suraphaktal}

| **X** |   |   |   | **2** |   | **3** |   |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{G}}\mathrm{R}}$ | G | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{P}}\mathrm{M}}$ | D | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{D}}\tr{\mathrm{S}}}$ | - | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | - | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ |
| **pa** | **śū** | **pa** | **ti** | **vi** | **-** | **śva** | **nā** | **-** | **tha** |
| $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{G}}\tr{\mathrm{R}}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{G}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{m}}$ | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{G}}\tr{\mathrm{R}}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{G}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | N | D |
| **mṛ** | **-** | **tyu** | **-** | **nja** | **ya** | **ja** | **pa** | **ma** | **hā** |
| D | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{S}}\mathrm{N}}$ | D | N | D | P | M | G | M |
| **de** | **-** | **va** | **nā** | **-** | **ma** | **ha** | **ra** | **ha** | **ra** |

:::
